changes.title: Appearance path constants
changes.description: Added userAppearancePath(uid) and roomAppearancePath(room) path resolver constants that map to users/{uid}/appearance.json and rooms-meta/{room}/appearance.json respectively. These serve as the single source of truth for all future appearance read/write operations.

changes.title: Appearance TTL caches
changes.description: Added _appearanceCache, _appearanceFetchedAt, and _APPEARANCE_TTL (5 min) for per-user appearance objects, and _roomAppearanceCache, _roomAppearanceFetchedAt, _ROOM_APPEARANCE_TTL (60 s) for per-room appearance objects. These follow the same TTL-gated pattern as the existing profile and room-settings caches to avoid redundant GitHub API fetches.

changes.title: DOM injection and particle trackers
changes.description: Added _injectedStyleTags (Set), _particleCanvases (Map), _observers (Array), and _previewCleanups (Array). These trackers provide centralized lifecycle management for dynamically injected style elements, particle canvas contexts, IntersectionObserver/MutationObserver instances, and preview teardown callbacks.

changes.title: Structured diagnostics ring buffer
changes.description: Implemented diagLog(subsystem, level, msg, ctx) — a color-coded, structured logger that appends to _diagBuffer (max 500 entries, FIFO). The buffer is loaded from localStorage on init, saved to localStorage on beforeunload via persistDiagnostics(), and can be exported as a HAR-style JSON download via exportDiagnosticsAsJson(). Supports levels: debug, info, warn, error, perf.

changes.title: User appearance loader stub
changes.description: Added _maybeLoadUserAppearance(uid, forceRefresh) — a TTL-gated async loader that fetches users/{uid}/appearance.json from the GitHub repo and populates _appearanceCache. Returns the cached object if within TTL, skips pending re-fetches. Full DOM application is deferred to v1.0.0.5+.

changes.title: Room appearance loader and apply stubs
changes.description: Added loadRoomAppearance(room, forceRefresh), applyRoomAppearance(room), and cleanupRoomAppearance(room) stubs. The loader is TTL-gated and populates _roomAppearanceCache. The apply and cleanup functions are diagnostic stubs only — full implementation lands in v1.0.0.10.

changes.title: Appearance propagation stub
changes.description: Added _propagateAppearanceChange(uid, appearanceObj) stub that updates _appearanceCache and logs via diagLog. DOM propagation (badges, glows, outlines, bubble effects) is deferred to v1.0.0.5+.
